name: Liang Long
page_title: Liang Long 粱龍 – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Liang Long might have been a chieftain of the Wuhu people of Hepu. Prior to the Yellow Turban Rebellion, Liang Long led an insurrection in Jiaozhi. Among others, he persuaded the Grand Administrator of Cangwu, Chen Shao, to join him. In AD 181, the Han general Zhu Jun raised troops from Kuaiji to quell Liang Long’s rebellion. Zhu Jun executed Chen Shao and then managed to win over the people of the area. In a very short amount of time, Liang Long’s rebellion collapsed. He was executed in the aftermath.

sections.short-biography: Led a rebellion in Jiaozhi. Was defeated and killed by Zhu Jun.

Among others, he persuaded the Grand Administrator of Cangwu, Chen Shao, to join him. In AD 181, the Han general Zhu Jun raised troops from Kuaiji to quell Liang Long’s rebellion. full_text:
Liang Long 粱龍
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Long (粱龍)was born in Jiaozhi. Led a rebellion in Jiaozhi. Was defeated and killed by Zhu Jun. Liang Long lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Liang Long might have been a chieftain of the Wuhu people of Hepu. Prior to the Yellow Turban Rebellion, Liang Long led an insurrection in Jiaozhi. Among others, he persuaded the Grand Administrator of Cangwu, Chen Shao, to join him. In AD 181, the Han general Zhu Jun raised troops from Kuaiji to quell Liang Long’s rebellion. Zhu Jun executed Chen Shao and then managed to win over the people of the area. In a very short amount of time, Liang Long’s rebellion collapsed. He was executed in the aftermath.
